agribalyse.name_en: Prepared pasta salad, with vegetable, meat or fish
agribalyse.name_fr: Salade de pâtes aux légumes, avec poisson ou viande

ingredients_text:
Cooked colored pasta 33% [durum wheat flour, water, powdered tomatoes, powdered spinach, rapeseed oil, apple cider vinegar],
vegetables in variable proportions 22% [endive, arugula],
13% yoghurt dressing [water, rapeseed oil, 12% yoghurt, spirit vinegar, sugar, modified corn starch, salt, egg yolk, milk protein, spices, thickener: xanthan gum, natural flavor],
cherry tomatoes 12%,
roasted chicken breast meat 10% [chicken breast meat, dextrose, salt, acidity regulator (sodium carbonates), stabilizers (sodium citrates, sodium acetates, calcium lactate), antioxidant (rosemary extracts)],
red beans 5% [red beans, water, salt, antioxidant (ascorbic acid)],
corn 5% [sweet corn, water, sugar, salt].
ingredients_text_en:
Cooked colored pasta 33% [durum wheat flour, water, powdered tomatoes, powdered spinach, rapeseed oil, apple cider vinegar],
vegetables in variable proportions 22% [endive, arugula],
13% yoghurt dressing [water, rapeseed oil, 12% yoghurt, spirit vinegar, sugar, modified corn starch, salt, egg yolk, milk protein, spices, thickener: xanthan gum, natural flavor],
cherry tomatoes 12%,
roasted chicken breast meat 10% [chicken breast meat, dextrose, salt, acidity regulator (sodium carbonates), stabilizers (sodium citrates, sodium acetates, calcium lactate), antioxidant (rosemary extracts)],
red beans 5% [red beans, water, salt, antioxidant (ascorbic acid)],
corn 5% [sweet corn, water, sugar, salt].
ingredients_text_pl:
Gotowany makaron kolorowy 33% [mąka z pszenicy durum, woda, pomidory w proszku, szpinak w proszku, olej rzepakowy, ocet jabłkowy],
warzywa w zmiennych proporcjach 22% [endywia escarola, endywia frisee, cykoria radicchio, rukola],
dressing jogurtowy 13% [woda, olej rzepakowy, jogurt 12%, ocet spirytusowy, cukier, skrobia modyfikowana kukurydziana, sól, żółtko jaja kurzego, białko mleka, przyprawy, substancja zagęszczająca: guma ksantanowa, aromat naturalny],
pomidory koktajlowe 12%,
pieczone mięso z piersi kurczaka 10% [mięso z piersi kurczaka, dekstroza, sól, regulator kwasowości (węglany sodu), stabilizatory (cytryniany sodu, octany sodu, mleczan wapnia), przeciwutleniacz (ekstrakty rozmarynu)],
fasola czerwona 5% [fasola czerwona, woda, sól, przeciwutleniacz (kwas askorbinowy)],
kukurydza 5% [kukurydza słodka, woda, cukier, sól].
ingredients_text_with_allergens: Cooked colored pasta 33% [durum wheat flour, water, powdered tomatoes, powdered spinach, rapeseed oil, apple cider vinegar], vegetables in variable proportions 22% [endive, arugula], 13% yoghurt dressing [water, rapeseed oil, 12% yoghurt, spirit vinegar, sugar, modified corn starch, salt, egg yolk, milk protein, spices, thickener: xanthan gum, natural flavor], cherry tomatoes 12%, roasted chicken breast meat 10% [chicken breast meat, dextrose, salt, acidity regulator (sodium carbonates), stabilizers (sodium citrates, sodium acetates, calcium lactate), antioxidant (rosemary extracts)], red beans 5% [red beans, water, salt, antioxidant (ascorbic acid)], corn 5% [sweet corn, water, sugar, salt].
